name: RA2/YR Map Filter
description: Scan and filter RA2/YR .yrm/.map files by criteria: name validity, game mode, max players, campaign detection, and mojibake filtering

inputs.label: Map Folder
inputs.help: Folder containing RA2/YR map files. Defaults to ./map under the script directory.

inputs.label: Preview Only
inputs.help: Preview mode — show what would be moved without actually moving files
